title: Kerala PSC – Electricity Worker – 985 Posts
applyMode: Online only (via KPSC One Time Registration portal)
shortInfo: KSEB Electricity Worker Recruitment 2026 via Kerala PSC notification is out to fill 985 vacancies across Kerala. Candidates with 10TH Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 30-04-2026, and closes on 03-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Kerala PSC website, keralapsc.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: KSEB Electricity Worker Recruitment 2026 via Kerala PSC Notification Out - Apply Online for 985 Posts
basic_details.short_information: KSEB Electricity Worker Recruitment 2026 via Kerala PSC notification is out to fill 985 vacancies across Kerala. Candidates with 10TH Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 30-04-2026, and closes on 03-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Kerala PSC website, keralapsc.gov.in.
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via KPSC One Time Registration portal)

qualification.education_qualification: Government approved 2-year National/State Trade Certificate in Electrician/Wireman trade.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official website of the Kerala Public Service Commission at www.keralapsc.gov.in via the One Time Registration (OTR) system. Applications submitted in any other manner will be summarily rejected. New users must first complete One Time Registration on the KPSC website before applying. Candidates who have already registered can apply by logging into their profile using their User-ID and Password and clicking on the 'Apply Now' button of the respective post in the Notification Link.
seo_tags: Kerala Public Service Commission Electricity Worker Recruitment 2026
